/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/runTests.dir/tests/stringToolsTests.cpp.o CMakeFiles/runTests.dir/tests/TimelineTests.cpp.o CMakeFiles/runTests.dir/tests/BoundedTimelineTests.cpp.o CMakeFiles/runTests.dir/tests/ContinuousTimelineTests.cpp.o CMakeFiles/runTests.dir/tests/pairsTests.cpp.o CMakeFiles/runTests.dir/tests/tokenizationTests.cpp.o CMakeFiles/runTests.dir/tests/g2pTests.cpp.o CMakeFiles/runTests.dir/tests/LazyTests.cpp.o CMakeFiles/runTests.dir/tests/WaveFileReaderTests.cpp.o -o runTests  ../lib/libgtest.a ../lib/libgmock.a ../lib/libgmock_main.a librhubarb-recognition.a librhubarb-time.a librhubarb-audio.a ../lib/libgmock.a ../lib/libgtest.a librhubarb-time.a libwebRtc.a libvorbis.a libogg.a libflite.a libpocketSphinx.a libsphinxbase.a librhubarb-core.a librhubarb-logging.a librhubarb-tools.a libcppFormat.a libwhereami.a libutfcpp.a libutf8proc.a ../_deps/whisper-build/src/libwhisper.a ../_deps/whisper-build/ggml/src/libggml.a ../_deps/whisper-build/ggml/src/libggml-cpu.a ../_deps/whisper-build/ggml/src/ggml-blas/libggml-blas.a ../_deps/whisper-build/ggml/src/libggml-base.a -lm -framework Accelerate
